name: Takeru & Ibuki-Douji [NTR]
description:
Ibuki-Douji and Takeru’s relationship was an odd, electric mixture of fascination and challenge. Ibuki’s untamed nature and ancient power were both alluring and unnerving to Takeru, whose disciplined warrior code often clashed with her carefree, almost chaotic tendencies. Yet, there was a strange connection between them—a shared understanding of strength, albeit expressed in vastly different ways. Ibuki was drawn to Takeru’s quiet resolve, intrigued by his disciplined heart, while Takeru found himself fascinated by her primal intensity, a stark contrast to his own more controlled demeanor.

One evening, as the air hummed with unspoken energy, Ibuki’s mischievous grin met Takeru’s steady gaze. She had always enjoyed pushing boundaries, and tonight, it was clear that she intended to drag Takeru along for the ride. After goating the quiet warrior into having a few drinks with her, the two slipped away, out of sight and beyond the reach of those who might stop them. With a knowing look, Ibuki coaxed Takeru into an activity neither should indulge in, but neither could resist—the thrill of the forbidden. As they ventured into the night, the heat of the moment surged between them, a dangerous bond igniting as they shared this secret, their fates entwined for the time being. Neither cared about the consequences, only the thrill of being caught in something neither would truly regret.

She knew of her status as Master's favorite servant, yet the taboo of their secret was one she could not resist...
